commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Mouth. Chaldean Syriac, "heart. "Aquila, "because Absalom was in wrath against him. "He had resolved upon his destruction. (Calmet)
Perhaps he had expressed his intention to some of the court; and this Jonadab (by whose means the crime had been committed, ver. 5) had heard of it. (Haydock)
